ab: pai kipakeljangu dja nu sun.
a ku ngada ti camak, tapuluq aku cavilj.
en: My name is camak, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: anemaya su ngadan?
a ku ngada ti camak.
aljaq su na anema zuku?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: aljaq a ken na paywan zuku.
kacalisiyan a su kinacemeqeljan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ui, paywan amen a tacekeljan.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是排灣族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is paywan.

ab: kacalisiyan a su kinacemeqeljan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ini, paywan aku kama, paylang aku kina.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是排灣族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is paywan, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: nima sun a aljak?
aljaq aken ni camak.
su kama a zuwa? pidanga cavilje ni madju?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: unem a pulu anga cavilj ni madju.
su kama a zuwa? pidanga cavilje ni madju?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: ini, niya lamaljeng ti madju i qinalja, alu a pulu anga a cavilj ni madju.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pida anga a cavilj na su kaka djavulung?
a ku kukaka a djavulung ita sa alu pulu a cavilj.
a su kaka djavulung ta cavilj djavulung alavac djanusun?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: lima cavilj a nia tideq.
pida a su pasaqaca?
ita sa sepadj pulu a ku pasaqaca.
cuacuay anga ini a mapacucun, tuki sun na ljavavaw anga?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: ui, ita sa djelu a puluq a ku pasavavaw.
tu kisun a meqaca anga?
ini, pasaliv anga a su pinacunan.
maliljai anga sun?
ini, meqaca anga ken.
meqacanga sun?
ui, djelu a pulu anga djindjin a ku siqaacanga tucu.
